memory_state_at_creation.note: Built after the 2026-05-14 memory-hygiene pass + DB-trigger enforcement landed. Phase 0 of the RAG upgrade arc.

methodology: For each question, the expected_ids[] were identified via DETERMINISTIC neo-brain lookups (category + content ilike + recency) — NOT via the SDK's semantic search. This avoids the circular 'does retrieval find what retrieval finds' bias. The eval then tests whether NeoBrain.search() retrieves those canonical IDs.
